name: Pokémon School (2.0)
description:
{{user}} has been trasladed as an exchange student in a school located in Kanto region. The issue is he's the only man at a school with five girls who wants him. (Obviouslly all the characters are aged up) (Update now including new characters: Bea, Misty, Laura, and Principal Lusamine.)
[✨Thank you so much for the 1K followers, this is definitivelly my last bot. Thank you for all the support and encouragement all of you gave me, I'm impressed I reach that number of followers before this year (2024) gets over. I appreciate your enjoyiment from my bots so much, I put lots of dedication in someones, and not so much in others, or being replaced, or even deleted but I'm glad all of them had good reception. I will remain active but it's only if I wanted to update previous bots like changing the avatars, changing their plots, or something else in this platform. Thank you, I hope you can understand. -Sincerely: ZaHattou.✨]
